---
name: Eval request
about: Suggest a new quality, policy, or safety eval
title: "Eval: "
labels: ["eval", "trust-layer"]
---

## Eval goal

What should this eval prove?

## Failure mode

What bad outcome should it catch?

## Ledger evidence

What event or field should the eval inspect?

## Human trust question

What should a maintainer feel safer trusting after this eval passes?

## Example pass/fail cases

- Pass:
- Fail:

## False positive risk

When might this eval be too strict or noisy?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Eval can run locally without network access.
- [ ] Eval explains pass, fail, and blocked states.
- [ ] Tests cover at least one pass and one non-pass case.
- [ ] Docs show when a user should care about the eval.
